description_long: This is a cylindrical, red fire extinguisher with a slightly domed top and a flat base, designed for upright placement. The body is made of metal and features a prominent white label with blue and black text and symbols, providing instructions and safety information. A black hose is attached near the top, looping around the body and secured with a metal band, with the nozzle resting along the side. The top of the extinguisher has a metal handle and lever mechanism, used for operation, and a visible safety pin. The surface shows signs of wear, with some scuffing and dullness, indicating regular use or age. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for placement in public or private urban environments for emergency use.
description: A red, cylindrical metal fire extinguisher with a black hose, white instruction label, and a metal handle and lever at the top.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main white instruction label, the handle and lever mechanism, and the hose secured along the side.
description_view_1: This view highlights the rear of the handle and lever, a smaller label, and the hose attachment point at the top.
description_view_2: The side view displays the length of the hose, the metal securing band, and a less visible label on the body.
description_view_3: The back view shows the hose running vertically down the cylinder, the securing band, and a secondary label with symbols.
attribute_label_or_signage: White rectangular label with blue and black text and symbols on the front; additional smaller labels with text and symbols on the side and back.
attribute_mounting_bracket_or_holder: A metal securing band is visible around the body, but no wall bracket or holder is present.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black hose is attached near the top, looping around the body and secured with a metal band; the nozzle is at the end of the hose.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A metal safety pin is visible at the top near the handle.
